reviews.text: Minus Zero stars. The worst. Please don't go there it's too expensive and they know NOTHING. I had 2 scans for AFC and when i did my scan somewhere else it was completely different numbers. Also, I've sent them a complaining email, received the automatic one saying “we will come back to you within 48 h” it's already been a week and no one has come back to me. My treatment was misled because of them. Do not use their services if you don't want to get scammed.

DO NOT USE!!
As a clinician who sees more and more ladies scanned in this “clinic” I advise you to stay away!! …

The service felt unprofessional. The staff didn’t even ask for my name when I arrived for my appointment, instead referring to me by the appointment time. The reception was rude, and the staff seemed rushed and lacked any warmth or emotion.

Extremely unprofessional doctor F. Vakilian. She has absolutely zero concern or commitment towards patient. We went in for my father’s high bp and we asked her some immediate meds to bring it down. Instead we were left stranded. She was such a lethargic person she didn’t care to communicate properly. She sent us a prescription in white paper with no letterhead or signature. We had to go back and forth to get a valid prescription. She didn’t even come back and talk to me or apologise for all her nonsense. She showed so much attitude and ego. Such reckless behaviour. Utter waste of money, time and mental health. I would never go back here!

I went to the doctor Ruchi Gupta after sever night episode with gallbladder pain. So it was not a routing ultrasound. The doctor told me everything was great. The report is super minimalistic with not details or sizes (which is already very …

Had a scan here because I didn’t want to wait for my NHS one. They completely missed the diagnosis, it all felt rushed, and they reported that there’s nothing there. My NHS scan happened 3 days later, and I had the same scan, with a doctor, and they found the diagnosis! As a doctor myself, the NHS scan was much more thorough, and they had a much higher quality scanner, so I regret wasting my time and money at this private place. I’d avoid at all cost, and not come back- even for a free scan- beware.

Extremely Disappointed – Serious Concerns About Diagnostic Accuracy

I had a deeply concerning experience with London Private Ultrasound. Despite …

I recently visited the scan clinic for a Two Breast Ultrasound Scan on 28th March and was promised to receive the report within 24 hours or right after the scan, as stated on their website. Despite multiple assurances from the clinic staff that the report would be sent to me by the end of the day, I am still waiting after 72 hours. I have reached out to them both yesterday and today, and each time I was told that the report would be sent promptly, yet it has not been received. As someone who has undergone scans before and received reports promptly, this experience has been disappointing and frustrating. It is not my usual practice to leave negative reviews, but I did not expect such a delay from a reputable clinic.

I scheduled an ultrasound for my injury and was advised during the initial scan to set up another appointment with a different doctor on Sunday for further guidance on treating my injury. A day before the Sunday appointment, I received a …

Tried to book online, but the website has issues with its booking system. The drop-down list shows 3–4 practitioners, yet no photos, credentials, or experience details. I had to search for them on Google instead. …

I found the practitioner cold and distant. As a person of so called color I am kind of of accustomed to certain odd things. However I felt hurried out as I was not given enough time to put my stuff back before the door was wide open to the plain view of the waiting patients.
As long as my report is well done and worth the money then I am sweet.
Ismael T Kamate

While the service was okay, I still waited 20 minutes, similar to the GP / NHS when you arrive, the place is a bit of a dingy basement but I could also get over that part. The chap was friendly enough but rushed to a diagnosis that was …

Awful experience! Came here for an early scan during my pregnancy and found the treatment from the woman who did my ultrasound incredibly cold. I did not feel welcomed or comfortable at any point, to the point where I felt judged. I would not recommend this at all as an experience, considering the price this is not the way people should be treated. Wish I'd read the reviews before.

I paid for a service I did not receive I feel conned. Avoid this please! I shall contact my bank about these people and trading standards. When working with peoples health how can people be so negligent? They care more about money then your health

The lady helping my wife with her scan was absolutely awful. She treated my wife like a robot and had no compassion whatsoever. We paid £160 for the scan and did not get treated with respect or dignity. I will never use or recommend this facility to anyone after our experience.
This clinic not only offers poor-quality examinations but also provides abysmal customer service. …

Very poor experience. My scan was half an hour late, the radiologist was very opinionated on what women should do in life (stay at home, work less, have babies etc), it was a huge lack of tact (instead of suggesting some tests he just …

Shame to Mr Aghaei.
He was very cold, distant and condescending.
Clinic likes the color of your money not the color of your skin as much.
Steer clear fellows!
Black n Bold if you are that is.

AVOID AVOID AVOID not professionals, I went for a thyroid and neck scan and was very anxious ,to be told that I had 2 large reactive lymphnodes on the neck and severe inflamation on my thyroid and underactive thyroid, pushing me to pay …

I had a really bad experience with London Private Ultrasound. I went for a early scan for pregnancy because I had some bleeding. The person who did the scan didn’t ask me any questions and started right away the scan. She was really not empathetic and was almost judgmental regarding me. So yes I had my scan, my pictures and more or less some answers of my questions but not in a comfortable atmosphere. Will never go again and highly not recommended for someone who is worried and need some reassurance and somehow some humanity.

I will use not my real name just for the safety issues. I called the clinic before I came in. I wanted to know if the stuff there is nice. The reason why I made that call was, because last year I was pregnant and I was doing everything …

My ultrasound was done by Dr Mina Taghavi who explained findings right away with clear diagnosis which meant that I need a surgery quite urgently. I found a surgeon who, based on the ultrasound report, agreed that the surgery should be done …
I was extremely distressed following a visit to my gp who on examination of a lump in my stomach had placed me on the hospital 2 week waiting list to carry out tests to eliminate ovarian cancer. …

Not happy first time coming here for a pregnancy ultrasound the lady was really rude in room 3 very robotic and fast didnt have any empathy and didnt let me ask any questions as she was cutting me off just did the scan and gave me the pictures very rude avoid she is the one opposite the black leather chairs next to the exit

Just had our first ultrasound appointment for our first pregnancy at this clinic. Unfortunately we had a very bad experience at this clinic.  The sonographer called Ms Tehrani attended us. She was very cold, unwelcoming towards us. There was no empathy of this entire procedure,  not even asking whether we are ready,  she asked me to expose my tummy and started with the procedure.  She was like robot without any emotions.
However they sent us electronic images and videos of the scan via email link. I am not sure if other sonographer are more welcoming at this institute but I would definitely not go back to this person.

Booked a Same day ultrasound for having abdominal pain with this clinic and I was told that everything looked fine. I ended up in a&e because the pain didn’t go away and was told I have gallstones!! Waste of money
Absolute scam. Completely unprofessional and never received any results from them. Avoid at all costs.

I would not recommend this place whatsoever. Everything was very rushed and there was no patient care. I was sped through the whole process and had nothing explained to me. As a healthcare professional myself, I was shocked at the service. Very disappointed!
Dirty, depressing, unfriendly and overall bad bedside manner
Horrible experience. The visit was rushed, the scans were poor quality and unclear, completely useless. Can't believe I paid so much for this. Save your money and go somewhere else, seriously.
Infringement of IP: Ultrasound London Limited, managed by Dr. Pedram Aghaei, has illicitly claimed full ownership of my website, www.londonsono.com, without my permission. …
My wife was very rushed doing an ultrasound and the results were poor. Scans that weren’t clear and not useful for our purposes. Not sure I would recommend spending money on this.
They dont talk properly and if you say you cannt hear them they cut the line in your face.
The lady in the reception is really so rude.  So bad experience! Never again.
so much verification .. sensible but ...
Wrong diagnosis for an expensive price

I can only give it one star given the dr being great on the day. I paid for a scan and report. The report was never received. I chased them up twice via email but never received a response. I followed their complaints process online, and …

Thank you for taking the time to leave a rating. We're sorry to hear that your experience wasn't up to expectations. We value all feedback and would appreciate any specific insights you might have to help us improve. Please feel free to reach out to us directly. Warm regards.

Disappointing. I saw the cardiologist, she took one reading of my blood pressure and didn't bother to do a few more. So she gave me a reading that didn't reflect my blood pressure accurately. Considering it's private and im paying out of …

Although efficient, the doctor didn’t send me the actual number results but just a summary of how he interpreted the results. I was also phoned several times on the day of my results to be informed that I had high potassium and probably needed an ecg. It sounded important to get it done asap (and they could book me in). Whereas when I spoke to my friend who is a GP she said this was not the case. It feels more like I was being hustled. As a psychologist I experience this as playing on people’s health fears. I will get a repeat blood test done but not there.
Paid for a abnormal ultrasound and was in there for about 3 minutes,I don’t believe I got what l paid for they wanted another £197 to look at what I thought I paid for …

After I got the results they insisted that I should have more tests done, ultrasounds, blood tests, the works, get a doctor’s opinion etc.  So I did, because it seemed like the right thing to do in case this is something serious. After getting another doctor’s feedback, turns out it was just harmless scar tissue and I spent all that money for nothing. The booking process itself is easy, the staff seem nice and they send results quickly, but I wouldn’t trust them as professionals.

The organisation of this clinic is very poor. The appointments start late, it is impossible to get the results quickly (which they do promise) and you have to follow up with them so they send them. The quality of services is also poor and …
I went for a pelvic scan to check if everything is ok - After the scan the sonograph asks me to speak to the Doctor, and I ended up spending £200 for his …

The update I mentioned....

These high reviews I really don't understand. …

Waited over 20 minutes, I wanted a scan for lipoma. Dr said he can see a huge lump just by looking at me with clothing on then he gave me a scan for turns out, I don’t have one. He said my muscle is lumpy , I asked if there was anything I could do he said,’I don’t know’ he could not offer me an alternative treatment. And while I was being examined a nurse casually walked into the room . I was actually not comfortable. What a waste of£150.
Expensive, got a wrong diagnosis from them, steer clear!
Sonographer was dismissive and condescending.

I recently visited London Private Ultrasound for a scan costing nearly £300, and unfortunately the experience did not meet expectations. On arrival, the directions instructed patients to go next door and into a basement location, which …

Doctor was good but the support staff were quite amateur. The doctor's assistant was wearing an earpod which was extremely unprofessional and had to ask questions every time the doctor asked her to write something down. The nurse who took my blood failed to find a vein and caused unnecessary pain when she could have looked at both arms before starting. Also English is not their first language so they did not understand me easily.

Quick and easy service to use with excellent availability. However there are points where the service could be improved - 1. Most sonographers will send a scan with images and report immediately after the scan whereas I am still waiting for mine over 24hrs later (many patients need this to contact their gynae/OBS for follow-up, and 2. Knowledge of the sonographer as I asked some basic questions about what was seen which the sonographer did not answer correctly or was not able to answer

The sonographer I had was struggling to stay awake during my abdomen ultrasound. He was clearly tired and nodded off a couple of times throughout. I wouldn't normally bring up something like this in a review but I felt, in these …

Booking the scans and receiving results was quick and efficient. I went in for an ultrasound on a bump, but then was pressured during the appointment to pay for several additional scans, a doctor consultation, and blood work to the tune of well over £1000. They conveniently had a card reader in the exam room to ensure payment. This all for a bump that, as I learned on getting a second opinion elsewhere, was simply a small bit of scar tissue.
Nice

Thank you for your feedback.

We’re sorry to see that your experience did not fully meet your expectations. We take all feedback seriously, as it helps us review and improve the service we provide.

If you would be willing to share more about your visit, we would really appreciate the opportunity to understand what happened and see how we can put things right. Please feel free to contact us at info@londonsono.com
A member of our team will respond as soon as possible.

Your experience matters to us, and we hope to have the opportunity to restore your confidence in our service.
